_comment: EXAMPLE teacher profile (placeholders only — committed to show the shape). A real profile lives in teacher.local.json (GITIGNORED). Generated/maintained by the teacher-profile skill's wizard; registered into shared/context as classroom/teacher-scope sop_refs + overrides. No real PII.

duties.duty: Chair the grade-level MTSS data meetings

handoffs.what: IEP accommodation needs for shared students
handoffs.notes: case manager owns the IEP; I implement classroom accommodations

preferences.communication_rules: no contact home after 5pm; CC the AP on disciplinary emails
preferences.pacing_norm: follow the district science scope & sequence

overrides.instruction: Default family-communication letters to a 6th-grade reading level
